title: Weak notifications for reminders
notes: Weak notification sound, sometimes missed; needs stronger notification

title: No confirmation for delete action
notes: Participants expressed uncertainty with accidental deletions; needs explicit confirmation prompt

title: Keyboard navigation issues with broken trackpad
notes: Keyboard-only navigation is difficult without trackpad; needs full keyboard accessibility

title: Zooming affects task manager layout
notes: Zooming in/out affects readability and task layout on second monitor; needs responsive design improvements

title: No progress report at the start of the day
notes: Progress report is a nice-to-have feature for motivation; deferred to Semester 2

title: No backup visibility when phone battery dies
notes: Without a backup device or notification, reminders are lost when phone dies; needs multi-device sync

title: Screen reader doesn't announce task deletion
notes: Screen reader fails to announce task deletion properly, needs improvement in live region management
